mapper.sql: id, ipaddress, username, osname, hostname, cpucount, systemcpuusage, `time`
mapper.insert: insert into jmeter_perf_agent_source (ipaddress, username, osname, hostname, cpucount, cpufree, systemcpuusage,memory,diskram, javaversion,`time`) values (#{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{osname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hostname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpucount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpufree,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{systemcpuusage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{memory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{diskram,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{javaversion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into jmeter_perf_agent_source
id,
ipaddress,
username,
osname,
hostname,
cpucount,
systemcpuusage,
`time`,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{osname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hostname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cpucount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{systemcpuusage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update jmeter_perf_agent_source
ipaddress = #{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
osname = #{osname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hostname = #{hostname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cpucount = #{cpucount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
systemcpuusage = #{systemcpuusage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`time` = #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update jmeter_perf_agent_source set ipaddress = #{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, osname = #{osname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hostname = #{hostname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cpucount = #{cpucount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cpufree = #{cpufree,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, systemcpuusage = #{systemcpuusage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memory = #{memory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, diskram = #{diskram,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, javaversion = #{javaversion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `time` = #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select * from jmeter_perf_agent_source where ipaddress = #{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by time limit 0,1 ;
mapper.update: update jmeter_perf_agent_source set username = #{username,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, osname = #{osname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hostname = #{hostname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cpucount = #{cpucount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cpufree = #{cpufree,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, systemcpuusage = #{systemcpuusage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, memory = #{memory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, diskram = #{diskram,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, javaversion = #{javaversion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `time` = #{time,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ipaddress = #{ipaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
